zh-tw.title: 暖男語錄大全
zh-tw.description: 讓人心頭一暖的甜蜜語錄，適合傳給心儀的對象或另一半

en.title: Sweet & Warm Quotes
en.description: Heartwarming sweet quotes perfect for sending to your special someone

zh-tw.content: 你不用刻意變成別人喜歡的樣子，因為我喜歡的就是你原本的樣子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對另一半說，特別是對方沒自信的時候
variations: 你做自己就好，那個樣子最好看了

en.content: You don't need to change yourself to be liked. I already like who you are.
en.editorNote: Perfect when your partner feels insecure
variations: Just be yourself. That version is my favorite.

zh-tw.content: 我不是很會說甜言蜜語的人，但看到你笑的時候，我覺得全世界都亮了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 直男也能用的暖心語錄
variations: 你的笑容是我今天最好的消息

en.content: I'm not great with sweet words, but when I see you smile, my whole world lights up.
en.editorNote: Even reserved guys can use this one
variations: Your smile is the best news I've gotten today.

zh-tw.content: 天冷了記得多穿一件，不是客套話，是因為你生病的話我會擔心到睡不著。
zh-tw.editorNote: 換季的時候傳特別有效
variations: 換季出門記得多帶一件，我沒辦法幫你擋冷空氣，但我可以一直擔心你

en.content: Dress warmly when it gets cold. I'm not just being polite - if you get sick, I'd worry too much to sleep.
en.editorNote: Great to send when seasons change
variations: Take a jacket when you go out. I can't block the cold for you — but I'll worry about you the whole time.

zh-tw.content: 未來的事我不確定，但有一件事很確定：不管發生什麼，我都想站在你身邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 告白或是感情穩定期都能用
variations: 不管路多難走，我想跟你一起走

en.content: I can't predict the future, but one thing is certain: no matter what happens, I want to stand beside you.
en.editorNote: Works for confessions or stable relationships
variations: No matter how tough the road gets, I want to walk it with you.

zh-tw.content: 吃飯了嗎？沒吃的話告訴我，我雖然不能馬上出現在你面前，但至少可以幫你叫外送。
zh-tw.editorNote: 務實又暖心的關心方式
variations: 就算我在很遠的地方，只要你說餓了，我都想辦法讓你先吃到東西

en.content: Have you eaten yet? If not, tell me. I might not be able to show up right away, but I can at least order delivery for you.
en.editorNote: Practical and heartwarming
variations: Even from far away, if you say you're hungry, I'll figure out a way to make sure you eat.

zh-tw.content:
今天走過你喜歡的那家麵包店，我不自覺停下來看了很久。
不是因為餓，是因為我想帶你來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給異地戀或是久沒見面的另一半，簡單但很有畫面感
variations: 路過你說想吃的那家店，我站在門口想了一下，還是沒進去——等你回來一起

en.content:
I walked past that bakery you always talk about today. I stopped and stared for a while.
Not because I was hungry. Because I wanted to bring you there.
en.editorNote: Send to a long-distance partner or someone you haven't seen in a while
variations: I passed by the restaurant you said you wanted to try. I stood at the door for a moment, then left — I'll wait for you.

zh-tw.content:
我不是特別浪漫的人，但只要你說冷，我第一個反應就是想把外套脫下來給你。
哪怕我自己也冷。
zh-tw.editorNote: 不說愛但勝過千言萬語，適合不善言辭的人傳給另一半
variations: 我沒辦法給你什麼豪華的承諾，但你不舒服的時候，我一定第一個出現

en.content:
I'm not a very romantic person. But the moment you say you're cold, my first instinct is to take off my jacket and give it to you.
Even when I'm cold too.
en.editorNote: Actions over words — perfect for people who struggle to say "I love you" out loud
variations: I can't promise you grand gestures. But I'll be the first one there when you're not okay.

zh-tw.content:
我不太說「我想你」，但每次看到有趣的東西，第一個念頭都是「要傳給你看」。
我想這大概就是我版本的想你吧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給默契很好但比較低調的另一半
variations: 每次聽到好聽的歌，都想問你喜不喜歡。這大概算是某種思念。

en.content:
I don't often say "I miss you." But every time I see something interesting, my first thought is: "I need to show this to them."
I think that's my version of missing you.
en.editorNote: Perfect for low-key couples with a strong connection
variations: Every time I hear a good song, I wonder if you'd like it. I think that counts as missing you.

zh-tw.content:
有人告訴你，你睡著的樣子特別好看嗎？

如果還沒有，那是因為還沒有人有機會這樣看著你。
我希望那個人可以是我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 告白前期或情侶之間都很適合，帶點羞澀又真心
variations: 你做夢的時候在想什麼？我有時候會很好奇，也有點想知道有沒有我

en.content:
Has anyone ever told you that you look especially peaceful when you sleep?

If not, maybe no one has had the chance to watch over you like that yet.
I hope I get to be that person.
en.editorNote: Sweet and slightly shy — works for early-stage couples or as a quiet confession
variations: I wonder what you dream about. And if there's any chance I show up in there.

zh-tw.content:
我不太會說什麼浪漫的話，但今晚睡前，想讓你知道一件事——
今天因為有你，我過得比任何一天都好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 睡前傳給另一半，簡單但真心，比晚安貼圖有溫度多了
variations: 今天結束了，但想謝謝你讓今天有你的部分變得特別好

en.content:
I'm not great at romantic speeches. But before you sleep tonight, I want you to know one thing —
Today was better because you were in it.
en.editorNote: Send this before bed instead of a generic goodnight sticker
variations: Today's over, but I want to thank you for making the parts with you the best parts.

zh-tw.content:
不管你今天覺得自己有多不夠好，
在我這裡，你從來都是值得被好好對待的人。
不用做到最好，你就已經夠好了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 對方壓力大或情緒低落時傳過去，比說『加油』有效十倍
variations: 你不需要每天都表現完美，只要你還在，我就很滿足了

en.content:
No matter how inadequate you feel today,
to me you have always been someone who deserves to be treated well.
You don't need to be at your best. You're already enough.
en.editorNote: Send this when your partner is stressed or down — far more powerful than 'hang in there'
variations: You don't have to be perfect every day. The fact that you're still here is more than enough for me.

zh-tw.content:
下雨天如果有人願意繞遠路送你回家，
我覺得那就是愛了。
不是因為雨，是因為他不想讓你一個人走。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下雨天傳給對方，或是做過這件事之後傳，讓對方知道你的心意
variations: 下雨天有人替你撐傘，不是因為他不怕淋濕，是因為他更不想讓你淋到

en.content:
If someone takes the long way to walk you home in the rain,
I think that's love.
Not because of the rain — but because they didn't want you to walk alone.
en.editorNote: Send this on a rainy day, or after you've done this for someone and want them to understand why
variations: When someone holds the umbrella over you instead of themselves, it's not because they don't mind getting wet.

zh-tw.content:
有些人在身邊時，你不覺得有多特別。
但如果哪天他不在了，你才會發現，日子少了點什麼，卻說不清楚是什麼。

我希望我對你來說是那樣的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 不用在特別的日子才傳，平靜地說出來反而更有力量
variations: 你不是我生活的全部，但你在的時候，生活比較有顏色

en.content:
Some people don't feel especially important when they're around.
But once they're gone, you notice something is missing — you just can't name it.

I hope I'm that kind of person to you.
en.editorNote: No need to save this for a special occasion — quiet sincerity lands harder than grand gestures
variations: You're not my whole world. But when you're here, the world has more color.

zh-tw.content:
有人說早安只是客套話。
但你每次傳來，我都覺得這一天開了個不錯的頭。
謝謝你願意讓早上從我這裡開始。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天早上都會傳早安的人，讓他知道這件小事對你很重要
variations: 你傳早安的時候，我的一天就已經不一樣了

en.content:
People say 'good morning' is just a pleasantry.
But every time you send it, my day starts better than it would have otherwise.
Thank you for beginning your morning with me.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who always says good morning — let them know it means more than they think
variations: The moment you say good morning, my day is already different.

zh-tw.content:
這個世界那麼大，能遇到的人那麼多。
但我在人群裡，第一個想找的還是你。
我想這就是答案了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 不用在特別的時刻才說，有時候平靜地告訴對方這件事，反而更有份量
variations: 人海那麼廣，我偏偏只想往你的方向走

en.content:
The world is wide and full of people.
But in any crowd, the first person I want to find is you.
I think that says everything.
en.editorNote: No special occasion required — saying this quietly on an ordinary day lands harder than a grand gesture
variations: There are so many people in the world. I only ever want to walk toward one of them.

zh-tw.content:
你說快了，我就等。
你說忙，我就不催。
不是因為無所謂——
是因為你值得我耐心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 給忙碌中的另一半，讓他知道你的等待是有意識的選擇，不是隨便的將就
variations: 我不是沒話說，是知道你現在最需要的不是更多壓力

en.content:
When you say 'soon,' I'll wait.
When you say you're busy, I won't rush you.
Not because I don't care —
but because you're worth the patience.
en.editorNote: Send to a busy partner — let them know your waiting is a choice, not indifference
variations: I'm not out of things to say. I just know the last thing you need right now is more pressure.

zh-tw.content:
你今天好嗎？
不是那種隨口問的，是真的想知道。
有沒有好好吃飯，有沒有什麼事讓你不開心。
如果有，告訴我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 簡單但有重量，對方感到被真正在乎的感覺，比說一百句愛你更有溫度
variations: 有沒有人欺負你？說出來，我幫你記著。

en.content:
How are you today?
Not as small talk — I genuinely want to know.
Did you eat properly? Is anything bothering you?
If so, tell me.
en.editorNote: Simple but weighty — being truly checked on feels more meaningful than a hundred 'I love yous'
variations: Is anyone giving you a hard time? Tell me. I'll remember it.

items.sourceNote: 搞笑母親節祝福語參考，全部重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
媽，謝謝你當初沒有把我退貨。
我知道我小時候很難搞，中間也不省心，現在偶爾還是讓你皺眉。
但你從來沒有放棄，這件事我記得。
zh-tw.editorNote: 母親節傳給媽媽，搞笑又真心，適合平時和媽媽關係輕鬆的子女
variations: 媽，你是全宇宙最有耐心的人——因為你養了我這麼多年

en.content:
Mom, thank you for not returning me.
I know I was a lot as a kid, a handful growing up, and probably still occasionally exhausting.
But you never gave up, and I haven't forgotten that.
en.editorNote: Send to mom on Mother's Day — funny but sincere, perfect if you have a relaxed relationship
variations: Mom, you're the most patient person in the universe — you've been putting up with me for decades.

items.sourceNote: 母親節感人語錄參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
妳把我帶到這個世界，教我走路、說話，教我在跌倒的時候怎麼站起來。
現在換我來——
把最好的時光，留給陪妳慢慢走的這幾年。
zh-tw.editorNote: 母親節傳給媽媽，感人但不矯情，適合成年子女表達心意
variations: 妳養我長大，我想陪妳慢慢老。

en.content:
You brought me into this world. You taught me to walk, to speak, to get back up when I fell.
Now it's my turn —
to save my best years for walking slowly beside you.
en.editorNote: A sincere Mother's Day message for adult children — heartfelt without being over the top
variations: You raised me up. I want to be there while you take it slow.

items.sourceNote: 研究報告中提到的土味情話版媽媽語錄，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
媽，你是我人生的導航。
不管我走到多遠，只要一迷路，第一個想到的就是你。
還好你沒有關機過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 土味情話風格的母親節語錄，傳給媽媽會笑又會暖，最適合在群組裡曬出來
variations: 媽，你是我的緊急聯絡人，也是我電話清單裡最常撥的號碼。

en.content:
Mom, you're my life's navigation.
No matter how far I wander, when I'm lost, you're the first voice I reach for.
Thank goodness you've never gone offline.
en.editorNote: Cheesy-pickup-line style Mother's Day message — she'll laugh, then tear up. Great for sharing in group chats.
variations: Mom, you're my emergency contact and the most-called number in my phone.

items.sourceNote: 母親節卡片語錄參考，重新改寫並加入個人視角

zh-tw.content:
長大之後才發現，你每次說「吃什麼都好」，
其實早就想好了要給我做什麼。
謝謝妳每一個假裝隨便的用心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合已成年的子女傳給媽媽，說出那種「懂了以後更感動」的體會
variations: 你說沒關係的時候，從來都不是真的沒關係。謝謝你替我撐著那些有關係的事。

en.content:
Now that I'm grown, I realize that every time you said 'whatever you want is fine,' you'd already decided what to make.
Thank you for all the love hiding inside all that 'it's nothing.'
en.editorNote: For adult children sending to mom — captures the feeling of finally understanding what she did for you
variations: Every time you said 'it's fine,' it wasn't fine — you were just handling it so I didn't have to. Thank you.

items.sourceNote: 幽默感人混搭的母親節語錄，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
媽媽是一種很奇特的存在：
她能記住你十年前說錯的話，
卻能假裝忘記你昨天犯的錯。

我覺得這種選擇性記憶，
大概就是這個世界上最溫柔的一種愛了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 幽默又感人，適合傳給有點嘮叨但其實超愛你的媽媽，保證她看完又笑又想抱你
variations: 媽媽永遠記得你所有丟臉的事，但只有她，不會真的拿來傷害你。

en.content:
Moms are a peculiar kind of person:
She can recall every embarrassing thing you said ten years ago,
but somehow forgets whatever you messed up just yesterday.

I think that kind of selective memory
might be the gentlest form of love in the world.
en.editorNote: Funny and touching — perfect for the mom who nags but loves fiercely; she'll laugh and then want to hug you
variations: Mom remembers everything embarrassing you've ever done — and she's the only person who'd never use it against you.

zh-tw.content:
你說你有時候會怕黑。
我記住了。

以後只要你在，燈就留著。
你不在的時候，我也不確定要怎麼辦。
zh-tw.editorNote: 對方提過一個小細節，你記住了，這種感覺讓人很窩心——適合傳給很了解的另一半
variations: 你說的每一件小事，我都記著。不是刻意，是因為你說的，我自然就記住了。

en.content:
You mentioned once that you're sometimes afraid of the dark.
I remembered.

Whenever you're here, I'll leave the light on.
When you're not — I'm honestly not sure what I'd do either.
en.editorNote: For when you've been paying attention to the small things they said — the most intimate kind of caring
variations: Every small thing you've mentioned, I've held onto. Not on purpose — it just stayed because it was yours.

zh-tw.content:
有時候不知道說什麼，
就想傳個訊息問你：還好嗎？

不是因為擔心你出了什麼事，
是因為我突然想到你了，
想確認你還在那裡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 平常沒事突然傳這個，比任何浪漫的話都更讓人感動，因為這是真的在想你
variations: 我想你，不是那種說出口很正式的想你，是那種突然停下來，腦子裡冒出你的臉的那種。

en.content:
Sometimes I don't know what to say,
so I just want to send you a message:
how are you?

Not because I'm worried something's wrong —
but because I suddenly thought of you,
and I wanted to know you're still there.
en.editorNote: Sending this out of nowhere, on an ordinary day, lands harder than any planned romantic gesture
variations: I miss you — not in a formal, serious way. In the way where you just pop into my head out of nowhere.

zh-tw.content:
你失敗了，我陪你重來。
你成功了，我陪你慶祝。

不管是哪個結果，
我都想在旁邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 對方面對一件重要的事情時傳，不是給建議，是告訴他你在——這種支持最有份量
variations: 你不需要先確定結果再讓我知道。在等待的過程裡，你也可以讓我在。

en.content:
If you fail, I'll be there to start again with you.
If you succeed, I'll be there to celebrate.

Either way,
I want to be beside you.
en.editorNote: Send before something important — not advice, just presence. That kind of support carries the most weight.
variations: You don't need to wait for the result before letting me in. I can be there during the waiting too.

zh-tw.content:
不知道你今天第一個想到的是誰，
但我今天第一個傳訊息的是你。

我想這應該不是巧合。
zh-tw.editorNote: 早上傳最有力量，讓對方從一起床就感覺被惦記著
variations: 我不確定我在你心裡排第幾，但你在我這裡，是第一個。

en.content:
I don't know who the first person you thought of was today.
But you were the first person I messaged.

I don't think that's a coincidence.
en.editorNote: Most powerful in the morning — they'll start the day knowing someone had them on their mind from the beginning
variations: I'm not sure where I rank in your mind. But you're number one in mine.

zh-tw.content:
有一種喜歡，不是轟轟烈烈的那種，
是你在的時候，
連沉默都覺得自在。

說的就是你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給交往後進入穩定期的另一半，告訴他你喜歡的是這種安靜的在一起
variations: 我不需要你一直說話，只要你在，我就覺得不孤單

en.content:
Some feelings don't arrive with fireworks.
They arrive quietly — where even silence is comfortable
when you're around.

That's what you are to me.
en.editorNote: Send to a partner you've settled into — telling them that the quiet, easy version of being together is what you love most
variations: You don't have to fill the silence. I just need you to be there.

zh-tw.content:
你說最近壓力有點大。
我沒有辦法替你解決大部分的事，
但我可以做一件事——

就是讓你今天不用假裝沒事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 對方壓力大時傳，不給建議、不說加油，只是讓他知道你在——這種溫度最直接
variations: 你不用每次都說「還好」。對我說真的，我可以接。

en.content:
You mentioned things have been stressful lately.
I can't solve most of it for you.
But there's one thing I can do:

Be the one person you don't have to pretend in front of today.
en.editorNote: Send when your person is struggling — no advice, no 'hang in there,' just presence. That's the most useful thing.
variations: You don't have to say 'I'm fine' to me. Tell me the real version. I can handle it.

zh-tw.content:
不知道你今天幾點醒的，
但不管幾點，
你醒來的那一刻，
這個世界就多了一個讓我想把今天過好的理由。
zh-tw.editorNote: 早上傳給另一半，比任何貼圖都更有溫度，對方多半會先愣一下然後傳愛心回來
variations: 你每天出現，這件事本身就讓我的日子變得比較值得

en.content:
I don't know what time you woke up today.
But whenever it was,
in that moment you opened your eyes,
the world gained one more reason for me to make today a good day.
en.editorNote: Send in the morning instead of a sticker — they'll pause, then send a heart back
variations: You showing up every day — that alone is enough to make my days worth having.

zh-tw.content:
我不擅長說關於未來的話，
但有一件事我很確定——

你說「我到了」的時候，
我永遠都想是那個在門口等你的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 見面或旅行回來的時候說，讓對方知道等他不是因為要等，是因為你願意
variations: 我不需要知道我們之後怎麼樣，只要今天你說來，我就在這裡

en.content:
I'm not good at talking about the future.
But one thing I know for sure:

Whenever you say 'I'm here,'
I always want to be the one waiting at the door for you.
en.editorNote: Say this when they arrive after a long trip or just a regular day — letting them know you didn't wait because you had to, but because you wanted to
variations: I don't need to know what comes next for us. I just need to know that when you say you're coming, I'll be here.

zh-tw.content:
如果今天很難撐，你不用假裝可以。

不用說「還好」，不用表現得好像一切沒事。
你願意說的話，我在這裡聽。
你不想說的話，我們就安靜地在一起也可以。
zh-tw.editorNote: 對方壓力很大或情緒很低落的時候傳，不給建議，只是讓他知道你在，這種感覺比什麼話都有份量
variations: 今天不需要表現好。有我在，你可以就這樣。

en.content:
If today is hard to get through, you don't have to pretend it isn't.

You don't have to say 'I'm fine' or act like everything's okay.
If you want to talk, I'm here to listen.
If you don't, we can just be quiet together.
en.editorNote: Send when your person is overwhelmed or shut down — no advice, just presence. This is often the most useful thing.
variations: Today doesn't require a performance. With me, you can just be however you are.

zh-tw.content:
我們有自己才懂的梗，
只有對方說才好笑的時刻，
不需要解釋的那種默契。

這些東西是沒有辦法複製的，
也沒有辦法跟別人說清楚。

但那就是我最喜歡的部分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給交往一段時間、已經有很多共同語言的另一半，告訴他你最珍惜的是這些只有你們才有的東西
variations: 有一種親密，不需要做什麼，只是你說一個眼神，我就知道你在想什麼——我很珍惜這個。

en.content:
We have our own inside jokes,
moments that are only funny because it's you saying them,
and a kind of shorthand that doesn't need explaining.

None of that can be replicated.
And I can't really describe it to anyone else.

But that's the part I love most.
en.editorNote: Send to a long-term partner to tell them the quiet inside-joke moments are your favorite — it's specific and warm
variations: There's a kind of closeness where you give me one look and I already know what you're thinking. I don't take that for granted.

zh-tw.content:
有時候一整天都忙，沒有時間多想什麼。

但到了要睡覺的時候，
腦子裡第一個冒出來的還是你。

我覺得這種慣性，
比任何話說得更清楚。
zh-tw.editorNote: 睡前傳，讓對方在結束一天之前知道，他是你最後一個想到的——這比「晚安」更有溫度
variations: 不管今天過得怎麼樣，最後我總是想到你。不是刻意的，是自然而然地就想到了。

en.content:
Sometimes the whole day goes by in a rush — no time to pause and think.

But when it's time to sleep,
you're the first thing that comes to mind.

I think that kind of habit
says more than any words.
en.editorNote: Send before sleep — telling someone they're the last thing on your mind lands warmer than any goodnight sticker
variations: No matter how the day goes, you're always where my thoughts end up. Not intentionally — just naturally.

zh-tw.content:
我沒辦法替你解決所有的事，
也沒辦法讓你的路變得容易走。

但有一件事我可以做到——

不管你現在在哪裡，我都不想讓你一個人走。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在對方面對困難或人生轉折點的時候傳，不承諾解決問題，只承諾不缺席——這種話更真實也更有份量
variations: 我不確定我能幫上什麼，但我確定一件事：你去哪裡，我都想知道你還好不好。

en.content:
I can't fix everything for you,
or make the road ahead any easier to walk.

But there's one thing I can do:

No matter where you are right now, I don't want you to be alone in it.
en.editorNote: Send when your person is facing something hard or a major life change — not promising solutions, just presence. That's more honest and more meaningful.
variations: I'm not sure how much help I can be. But I know one thing: wherever you go, I want to know you're okay.

zh-tw.content:
你說你喜歡吃東西。

所以每次我看到你可能會喜歡的東西，
都會先想一下：如果我們一起吃，這個時刻會是什麼感覺。

我想的時間有時候比實際去吃的時間還長。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給喜歡吃東西的另一半，讓他知道你一直默默在替他記著哪些東西值得一起去嚐
variations: 你說過想吃的地方，我都記著。不是為了提醒你，是因為想和你一起去。

en.content:
You mentioned you love food.

So every time I see something you might enjoy,
I spend a moment imagining: what would this taste like if we were eating it together?

Sometimes I spend more time imagining it than it would take to actually eat it.
en.editorNote: Send to a partner who loves food — it tells them you've been quietly saving experiences for the two of you
variations: All the places you said you wanted to try — I've been keeping a mental list. Not to remind you. Just because I want to go with you.

zh-tw.content:
我不太擅長說「我愛你」這三個字。

但我很擅長記得你喜歡的口味，
點餐的時候幫你多要一份醬，
天冷的時候把熱的那份留給你。

我想這就是我表達愛的語言。
zh-tw.editorNote: 不善言辭的人傳這個給另一半，讓對方知道那些不起眼的小動作背後是什麼
variations: 有一種在乎，是記得你說過不喜歡香菜，然後點餐的時候自動說：「這個不要加香菜，謝謝。」

en.content:
I'm not great at saying 'I love you' out loud.

But I'm good at remembering your favorite flavors,
asking for extra sauce when we order,
and saving the warm portion for you when it's cold.

I think that's just my language for it.
en.editorNote: For the partner who shows love through small acts rather than words — this names what they've been doing all along
variations: Caring looks like: remembering you don't like cilantro, and automatically saying 'no cilantro' before you even have to ask.

zh-tw.content:
你笑的聲音我記得。

不是特別刻意去記，就是自然留住了。

有時候想到你，腦子裡浮現的不是你說過什麼話，
而是那個笑聲出現時的感覺。

那個感覺，讓人很難不想再聽到一次。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你覺得那種笑聲讓人想多聽幾次的人，不需要解釋，他就是那個人
variations: 你笑起來的樣子，我可以認出來——在很多人裡面，在很遠的地方，我都認得出來是你。

en.content:
I remember what your laugh sounds like.

Not because I tried to memorize it — it just stayed.

Sometimes when I think of you, it's not something you said that comes back,
but the feeling of being there when that laugh came out.

That feeling makes it hard not to want to hear it again.
en.editorNote: Send to someone whose laugh you can't help but love — they'll understand immediately
variations: Your laugh is something I'd recognize anywhere — in a crowd, across a distance. I'd know it's you.

items.sourceNote: 日常陪伴語錄，重新創作

zh-tw.content:
不是只有特別的日子才能告訴你這件事——

你讓我的日常變得不一樣了。
不是因為你做了什麼，
是因為你在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 平常的一天傳給對方，比在特殊節日說更有份量，因為這種話說的是習慣，不是儀式
variations: 有你的日子和沒有你的日子，感覺確實不一樣。不誇張，就是不一樣。

en.content:
You don't need a special occasion for this —

You've made my ordinary days different.
Not because of anything you did.
Just because you're here.
en.editorNote: Send on a completely ordinary day — this lands harder than anything said on a holiday, because it's about habit, not ceremony
variations: Days with you and days without you feel different. Not exaggerating. They just do.

items.sourceNote: 下班路上思念語錄，重新創作

zh-tw.content:
下班的路上，不知道為什麼就想到你。

不是因為有什麼特別的事，就是那種突然想知道你今天過得怎樣的感覺。

有時候最真的想念，不是一首歌或一個地點觸發的，是什麼都沒發生，它就來了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下班後直接傳這個，不需要任何原因，這就是最好的理由
variations: 路過某個地方，突然想到你——不是因為那裡有什麼特別的記憶，是因為看到了就想讓你也看到。

en.content:
On the way home, I thought of you. No particular reason.

Just that sudden feeling of wanting to know how your day went.

Sometimes the most genuine kind of missing someone isn't triggered by a song or a place.
It just arrives on its own, out of nothing.
en.editorNote: Send this right after work — no reason needed, and that's exactly the point
variations: I passed somewhere and thought of you — not because of a memory attached to it, but because I saw it and wanted you to see it too.

items.sourceNote: 記住小細節語錄，重新創作

zh-tw.content:
你說你喜歡窗邊的位置。

我以後訂位的時候會記得的。
不是很大的事，但你說過的話，我都想記著。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說過一些細節但不確定你有沒有聽進去的人，讓他知道你有在聽，而且記住了
variations: 你說的那些「隨便說說」，我其實都沒有隨便聽。

en.content:
You mentioned you like sitting by the window.

I'll remember that when I make reservations.
It's not a big thing.
But the things you say — I want to hold onto them.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who mentioned something small, unsure if you noticed — let them know you did, and you kept it
variations: All those things you said offhandedly — I wasn't listening offhandedly.

items.sourceNote: 睡前感謝語錄，重新創作

zh-tw.content:
今天結束了。

沒什麼特別的事情發生，但你出現在我的一天裡——
我覺得，這就已經是一件值得記住的事了。

晚安。
zh-tw.editorNote: 睡前傳，不需要附上任何解釋或理由，這句話本身就是最完整的晚安
variations: 今天的你，讓今天變得值得說晚安。

en.content:
Today is over.

Nothing especially remarkable happened.
But you were in it —
and somehow that already makes it worth remembering.

Goodnight.
en.editorNote: Send before sleep with no explanation — the message is complete on its own
variations: The version of today that had you in it — that's the one worth saying goodnight to.

items.sourceNote: 「家的感覺」主題參考，全部重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我以前不太懂「回家的感覺」是什麼意思。

後來遇到你，才發現那不是一個地點——
是一種人。

跟你在一起，不管在哪裡，我都覺得到了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你有安全感的另一半，不需要任何特殊場合，平常的一天說更有力量
variations: 你不是我的全部，但你讓我覺得有個地方可以回。這件事對我來說很重要。

en.content:
I used to wonder what people meant when they said 'it feels like home.'

Then I met you — and I realized it's not a place.
It's a person.

Wherever we are, with you, I feel like I've arrived.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who makes you feel safe — no occasion needed, an ordinary day makes it land harder
variations: You're not everything. But you're the reason I feel like I have somewhere to come back to. That matters more than I can say.

items.sourceNote: 成長陪伴主題語錄參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我喜歡現在的我們，
但我更期待一年後、五年後、十年後的我們。

不是因為現在不好，
是因為和你在一起，我想看我們還能變成什麼樣子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合感情穩定中的情侶，讓對方知道你不是只想著現在，而是想著長遠——這種話說出來很有份量
variations: 我喜歡你，也喜歡我們一起變好的那個過程。

en.content:
I love who we are right now.
But I'm even more curious about who we'll be a year from now, five years, ten years.

Not because now isn't enough —
but because being with you makes me want to see what we grow into.
en.editorNote: For couples in a stable relationship — letting them know you're thinking long-term carries real weight
variations: I love you now. I also love the version of us that's still becoming.

items.sourceNote: 觀察對方小習慣主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我注意到你在想事情的時候會咬嘴唇。
開心的時候眼睛會先笑。
不確定的時候喜歡把手機翻來翻去。

這些小動作，你大概自己都沒意識到。

但我都記著了。
因為那些是很真實的你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給很熟悉的另一半，讓他知道你不只是看他，是真的在觀察他——這種細膩的關注讓人很有被愛的感覺
variations: 你有很多小動作，你不知道，但我都看見了。我很喜歡那些只有我知道的你。

en.content:
I've noticed you bite your lip when you're thinking.
Your eyes smile before the rest of your face does when you're happy.
You fidget with your phone when you're unsure about something.

You probably don't realize you do any of this.

But I've been paying attention.
Because those small things are the most real parts of you.
en.editorNote: Send to someone you know well — letting them know you've been quietly watching the small details makes them feel deeply seen
variations: You have all these little habits you're not even aware of. I know every single one. And I love them.

items.sourceNote: 窩在家裡一起發呆主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
有一種約會我很喜歡，
就是什麼都不用做的那種。

一起坐著，各做各的事，
偶爾說一句話，偶爾對到眼。

不需要有行程，不需要去哪裡。
你在，這件事本身就已經是今天最好的安排了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給喜歡在一起「發呆」的另一半，讓他知道你最享受的不是那些特別的時刻，而是這種安靜的在一起
variations: 我最喜歡的時光，就是那種沒有目的地跟你在一起的時光。

en.content:
There's a kind of date I love most.
The kind where we don't have to do anything.

Just sitting together, each doing our own thing,
tossing out a sentence every now and then, catching each other's eyes.

No agenda. No place to be.
You being here — that's already the best plan for the day.
en.editorNote: Send to a partner who loves quiet time together — telling them the do-nothing days are your favorite is its own kind of romance
variations: My favorite time with you is the kind with no purpose. Just us, just here.

items.sourceNote: 時間感受主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
跟你在一起，時間的感覺不太一樣。

兩個小時過得像二十分鐘，
但結束之後的空白，卻好像拉得很長很長。

我覺得這種不成比例，大概就是喜歡你的一種症狀。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你覺得時間過太快的人，讓他知道你很享受那段時光，同時也說出分開後的那種失落感
variations: 和你說話的兩小時，從來不夠用。但你說要走的那一秒，我每次都感覺到了。

en.content:
Time feels different when I'm with you.

Two hours go by like twenty minutes.
But the quiet after you leave stretches out for much longer.

I think that imbalance is just a symptom of liking you.
en.editorNote: Send to someone whose company makes time vanish — it tells them you love the time you have and feel the gap when it ends
variations: Two hours talking to you is never enough. But I notice the exact second you say you have to go.

items.sourceNote: 緊張小動作觀察主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我注意到你緊張的時候會清喉嚨，
然後假裝在看手機。

但你的耳朵會紅。

我沒有說，是因為我覺得那個樣子很好看。
現在說，是因為我想讓你知道，我有在看。
zh-tw.editorNote: 對剛認識或喜歡的人說，讓他知道你一直在悄悄觀察，帶點甜蜜的窘迫感，適合告白前後
variations: 你以為你掩飾得很好，但你緊張的時候有一個小動作——我知道，不說，因為我覺得可愛。

en.content:
I noticed you clear your throat when you're nervous,
then pretend to check your phone.

But your ears go red.

I never said anything because I thought it was endearing.
I'm saying it now because I want you to know I've been paying attention.
en.editorNote: Tell someone you've been quietly watching the small nervous tells they think no one notices — sweet and a little flustering, good around confession time
variations: You think you hide it well. But when you're nervous, there's this one little thing you do — I know, I won't say what, because I think it's cute.

items.sourceNote: 每天被選擇的感覺主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
愛不是只說一次的事。

是你今天也選擇了我，
明天大概也會選擇我，
後天還是一樣。

這種每天都重新選一次的感覺，
我很珍惜。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給交往一段時間的另一半，讓他知道你不把「在一起」這件事當理所當然，而是感謝他每一天的留下來
variations: 謝謝你今天也在。不是每個人都願意日復一日地選擇同一個人，你願意，我記得。

en.content:
Love isn't something you say once.

It's you choosing me today,
probably choosing me tomorrow,
and the day after that.

That feeling of being chosen again and again —
I don't take it for granted.
en.editorNote: Send to a long-term partner — letting them know you don't treat 'being together' as a given, but as something they actively give you every day
variations: Thank you for still being here today. Not everyone is willing to choose the same person day after day. You do. I notice.

items.sourceNote: 展示真實自我的勇氣主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
在你面前，我比較不需要假裝。

不用說「沒事」，不用表現得很好，
不用想太多講出來會不會太奇怪。

這種可以直接是自己的感覺，
我以前以為很難找到。

謝謝你讓我覺得，做我自己就夠了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你感到安全、不需要武裝自己的人，道出那種被真正接受的感謝——比說「我喜歡你」更深一層
variations: 你是那種讓我不小心就說出真心話的人。我沒有抱怨，只是想讓你知道你對我來說有多不一樣。

en.content:
Around you, I don't have to pretend as much.

I don't have to say 'I'm fine,' don't have to perform,
don't have to wonder if what I'm about to say is too much.

That feeling of being allowed to just be myself —
I used to think it was hard to find.

Thank you for making me feel like being me is enough.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who makes you feel safe enough to drop the act — this is a deeper kind of gratitude than 'I like you'
variations: You're the kind of person who makes me accidentally say honest things. I'm not complaining. I just want you to know how different that is.

items.sourceNote: 傳訊息習慣主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我發現我傳訊息給你，
已經不需要理由了。

看到好笑的就傳，
吃到好吃的就傳，
什麼都沒發生也想傳一句說你好。

這種不需要藉口就想聯絡你的感覺，
我覺得這個就是習慣，
也是喜歡。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個你已經習慣隨時分享的人，告訴他這個習慣對你來說意味著什麼——不刻意但很真實
variations: 我傳訊息給你不是因為有事，是因為習慣了有什麼都想讓你知道。這件事本身就說明了很多。

en.content:
I've noticed I don't need a reason to message you anymore.

See something funny — I send it to you.
Eat something good — I tell you.
Nothing happens at all — I still want to say hi.

Not needing an excuse to reach out —
that's what habit looks like.
And I think it's also what liking someone looks like.
en.editorNote: Send to the person you've gotten used to sharing everything with — telling them what that habit means is low-key but hits differently
variations: I don't message you because I have something to say. I message you because I've gotten used to wanting you to know things. That says a lot, I think.

items.sourceNote: 讓對方看見不完美自我主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我有些地方不太好。

你知道的那些，我沒有刻意藏。
是因為在你面前，我不太想費力假裝。

這種感覺，對我來說其實不容易。

謝謝你讓我不需要每次都先整理好自己才敢靠近你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你覺得不需要武裝就能靠近的人——比說「我喜歡你」更深一層的告白，說的是信任
variations: 我不是在你面前最好的版本，但你是少數讓我不想偽裝的人。這件事對我來說，其實很難得。

en.content:
There are parts of me that aren't great.

The ones you already know — I didn't hide them on purpose.
It's just that around you, I don't feel like putting in the effort to pretend.

That doesn't come easily to me.

Thank you for being someone I don't have to sort myself out before getting close to.
en.editorNote: Send to someone you trust enough to be unpolished around — this is a deeper confession than 'I like you'; it's about feeling safe
variations: I'm not my best version around you. But you're one of the few people I don't want to perform for. That's rarer than it sounds.

items.sourceNote: 平靜落地感主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
有些人讓你心跳加速。
有些人讓你覺得終於可以呼吸了。

你是後者。

跟你在一起，不是興奮的那種感覺，
是那種回到家、脫掉鞋、不用再撐著的感覺。

我很喜歡這個。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個讓你感到踏實、不需要表演的人，說出「安靜的喜歡」有多珍貴
variations: 跟你在一起，我不需要一直保持狀態。這聽起來很普通，但對我來說這是很高的評價。

en.content:
Some people make your heart race.
Some people make you feel like you can finally breathe.

You're the second kind.

Being with you isn't the exciting kind of feeling —
it's the kind where you get home, take off your shoes, and don't have to hold it together anymore.

I really love that.
en.editorNote: Send to the person who makes you feel grounded — naming the quiet, 'exhale' kind of love is its own form of romance
variations: With you, I don't have to stay 'on.' That sounds simple, but it's actually one of the best things I can say about someone.

items.sourceNote: 想像未來一起變老主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我有時候會想，我們老了以後是什麼樣子。

大概還是一樣——
你說東，我往西，然後你翻一個白眼，
我裝作沒看到，繼續往西。

但我們最後還是會走到同一個地方。

我很期待那個版本的我們。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給交往已久的另一半，用輕鬆的方式說出「我想和你走很久」——有笑點又有溫度
variations: 我想像過我們八十歲的樣子，你大概還是會嫌我太吵，我還是會覺得你太嚴肅。但我們還是在一起。這樣就好。

en.content:
I think about us when we're old sometimes.

Probably still the same —
you say one thing, I go the other way, you give me that look,
I pretend I didn't see it and keep going my way.

But we'd still end up in the same place.

I'm really looking forward to that version of us.
en.editorNote: Send to a long-term partner — a lighthearted way to say 'I want this to last' that has both humor and warmth
variations: I've imagined us at eighty. You'd probably still think I'm too loud, I'd still think you're too serious. And we'd still be together. That's enough.

items.sourceNote: 主動聯絡需要勇氣主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
你知道嗎，
當初第一次傳訊息給你之前，
我盯著輸入框看了很久。

刪了又打，打了又刪。

最後按下送出的那一刻，
我的心跳大概快了一倍。

現在想起來覺得有點好笑。
但如果讓我重來一次，
我還是會按下去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你鼓起勇氣主動聯絡的人，讓他知道你當時有多緊張——帶點回憶的甜蜜感
variations: 你是我少數先傳訊息的人。我平常不太這樣。所以你可以知道，那次我是認真的。

en.content:
You know, before I sent you that first message,
I stared at the text box for a long time.

Typed something, deleted it. Typed again, deleted again.

When I finally hit send,
my heart was going twice as fast.

Looking back, it feels a little funny.
But if I could do it over,
I'd hit send again.
en.editorNote: Send to the person you worked up the nerve to message first — letting them know how nervous you were adds a sweet layer of retrospect
variations: You're one of the few people I've ever messaged first. I don't usually do that. So now you know — that time, I meant it.

items.sourceNote: 「第一個想報喜的人」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
今天有一件好事發生。

我還沒跟任何人說，
因為我想先告訴你。

不是因為你是第一個聯絡的，
是因為好消息如果不先讓你知道，
感覺就少了一點什麼。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個你第一個想分享好消息的人，讓他知道這個「第一個」對你有多大意義
variations: 每次有什麼值得開心的事，腦子裡第一個浮現的就是你的名字。我覺得這個順序，說明了很多。

en.content:
Something good happened today.

I haven't told anyone yet —
because I wanted to tell you first.

Not because you were the first one to text me.
But because good news doesn't feel complete
until you know about it.
en.editorNote: Send to the person who is always your first call with good news — telling them that 'first' is intentional makes them feel truly chosen
variations: Every time something good happens, your name is the first one that comes to mind. I think that order says everything.

items.sourceNote: 「放下手機專心陪你」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我是一個很容易滑手機的人。

但你說話的時候，
我發現我會不自覺地把手機翻過去放著。

不是刻意的，
就是你比螢幕上的任何事情都還要值得我看。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你自然而然想專心陪伴的人，比說「我很在乎你」更有力量，因為這是行動
variations: 我平常很難不滑手機，但跟你在一起，我常常忘了它在哪裡。這不是小事。

en.content:
I'm the kind of person who's always on their phone.

But when you're talking,
I notice I instinctively turn it face-down.

Not on purpose.
It's just that you're more worth looking at
than anything on that screen.
en.editorNote: Send to the person who makes you forget to check your phone — this is more powerful than 'I care about you' because it's about what actually happens
variations: I normally can't go ten minutes without checking my phone. With you around, I forget it exists. That's not nothing.

items.sourceNote: 「隨機想起你」與感官記憶主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
有一首歌，
我現在沒辦法好好聽完了。

因為前奏一下，
腦子裡就是你。

不是不好，只是有時候
只是想開車，結果變成想你。

你佔據我生活的方式，
比我想的還要多。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓某首歌、某個地方、某種氣味都變成他的人——讓他知道他在你生活裡佔的位置有多深
variations: 某個香味、某首歌、路過某個街角——這些東西現在都跟你有關係了。你不知道你佔了多少地方。

en.content:
There's a song I can't get through properly anymore.

Because the intro starts,
and there you are in my head.

Not a bad thing — it's just that sometimes
I only wanted to drive somewhere,
and it turns into missing you.

You've taken up more space in my life
than I realized.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who has become the association for a song, place, or smell — let them know how deeply they've settled into your everyday world
variations: A certain smell, a certain song, a corner on a street I walk past — they're all connected to you now. You don't know how much space you've claimed.

items.sourceNote: 「你讓平凡變得特別」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
跟你一起做的事，
好像都變得不一樣了。

便利商店的關東煮，
路邊隨便找的一家咖啡廳，
等公車的十分鐘。

這些本來沒什麼的事情，
因為你在，
都變成某種值得記住的時刻。

我覺得這就是你的體質。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你覺得連無聊的事都有趣起來的人，讓他知道他不是讓生活更刺激，而是讓生活更值得
variations: 好像不管去哪裡、做什麼，只要你在，那件事就自動升級了。這是一種很特別的能力。

en.content:
The things I do with you
seem to become something different.

Convenience store snacks at midnight,
a random café we picked off the street,
ten minutes waiting for the bus.

None of it should be memorable.
But because you were there,
all of it is.

I think that's just something about you.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who makes ordinary things feel worth remembering — this tells them it's not about excitement, it's about them
variations: It doesn't matter where we go or what we do. The moment you're there, it automatically becomes something better. That's a rare kind of magic.

items.sourceNote: 「一起計畫未來小事」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我最近在看某個地方的資訊，
看著看著就開始想：
如果是我們一起去，哪個景點你會喜歡？
你大概會嫌排隊太長，
但我猜你還是會去。

我還沒問你，
只是先在心裡把你放進去了。

這算不算某種規劃未來？
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給你已經習慣把他放進未來計畫的人，讓他知道你腦海裡的旅行清單，他早就在上面了
variations: 我存了一個地方，想說之後帶你去。還沒問你有沒有空，就先記起來了。這大概就是很想跟你去的意思。

en.content:
I was reading about a place recently,
and somewhere along the way I started thinking:
if we went together, which part would you actually like?
You'd probably complain about the lines,
but I'm pretty sure you'd still go.

I haven't asked you yet.
I just quietly put you in the plan first.

Does that count as thinking about our future?
en.editorNote: Send to someone who has already become a fixture in your mental future plans — letting them know they were penciled in before you even asked is quietly romantic
variations: I bookmarked a place I want to take you. Haven't checked if you're free yet — just saved it first. That's pretty much what 'really wanting to go with you' looks like.

items.sourceNote: 「早安/晚安思念」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
每天早上睜開眼，腦袋還沒完全清醒，
第一個出現的念頭就是你。

我覺得這不算太壞的開始。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天早上都會想到的那個人，語氣輕鬆但情感真實，適合情侶日常早安訊息
variations: 鬧鐘還沒響我就醒了，第一件事就是想你。一天的開始已經很好了。

en.content:
Every morning, before I'm even fully awake,
you're already the first thing on my mind.

I think that's a pretty good way to start a day.
en.editorNote: Send as a good morning text — light in tone but genuinely felt, great for couples in any stage
variations: I woke up before my alarm and the first thing I thought of was you. The day's already off to a good start.

items.sourceNote: 「睡前思念」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
要睡了。
今天沒什麼特別的事，
但不知道為什麼還是想跟你說一聲。

晚安，記得睡飽。
zh-tw.editorNote: 睡前傳給對方，不需要理由，這種「沒事但就是想說」的訊息往往最暖
variations: 準備睡了，沒什麼要說的，就是想讓你知道我有想到你。晚安。

en.content:
About to sleep.
Nothing special happened today,
but I still felt like saying something to you.

Good night. Get some rest.
en.editorNote: A bedtime text with no agenda — sometimes the most touching messages are the ones sent for no reason at all
variations: Heading to bed. Nothing to report, just wanted you to know I was thinking of you. Good night.

items.sourceNote: 「小事裡的愛」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我喜歡你的方式，
可能不是那種很轟烈的。

比較像是：
記得你不喝冰的，
記得你怕黑，
記得你說過哪條路比較好走。

就是這種小事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給在乎的人，讓他知道你的愛不是說出來的，是藏在那些記住的小細節裡
variations: 愛你的方式很普通，就是把你說過的每一件小事都記起來。

en.content:
The way I like you
probably isn't dramatic.

More like:
remembering you don't drink cold water,
knowing you're scared of the dark,
keeping track of which route is easier for you.

Just small things like that.
en.editorNote: Send to someone you want to show that love lives in the details, not grand gestures
variations: Loving you isn't complicated. It's just remembering every small thing you've ever mentioned.

items.sourceNote: 「想見你」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
不是那種很難熬的想念，
就是走著走著，
突然覺得如果你在旁邊就好了。

可能是看到了什麼有趣的，
或是什麼都沒有，就只是這樣想。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在平靜的某一天突然傳給對方，比「我好想你」更日常、更真實
variations: 不是很強烈的感覺，就是突然覺得要是你在這裡就好了。沒什麼特別的理由。

en.content:
It's not the unbearable kind of missing.
More like walking around
and suddenly thinking — it'd be nice if you were here.

Maybe something caught my eye.
Or maybe nothing did. I just thought of you.
en.editorNote: Send on a quiet ordinary day — more grounded and honest than 'I miss you so much'
variations: Not an intense feeling, just — I kept thinking it would've been better if you were here. No real reason.

items.sourceNote: 「陪伴與安全感」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
跟你說話的時候，我不用特別想要說什麼對的。

可以說廢話，
可以說不完整的句子，
可以說到一半停下來。

這種感覺我很少有，謝謝你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你覺得完全放鬆、不需要表演的那個人，這種安全感比很多情話都更珍貴
variations: 跟你說話是我最不需要想太多的時候。這對我來說不容易，所以才更重要。

en.content:
When I talk to you, I don't have to think about saying the right thing.

I can ramble.
I can trail off mid-sentence.
I can say nothing that makes sense.

That's rare for me. Thank you for that.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who makes you feel completely at ease — that kind of safety is worth more than most romantic words
variations: Talking to you is the one time I don't have to overthink. That doesn't come easy to me, which is why it means a lot.

items.sourceNote: 「日常即是愛」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
跟你在一起的普通日子，
就是我最想要的那種生活。

不用哪裡特別，不用什麼安排，
就只是你在，就夠了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你覺得「家」不是一個地方而是一個人的對象，平靜但有力
variations: 你在的地方就是我最想待的地方，不需要任何理由。

en.content:
An ordinary day with you
is exactly the kind of life I want.

Nothing special has to happen.
You just have to be there.
en.editorNote: For the person who feels like home — quiet but powerful, no grand gesture needed
variations: Wherever you are is where I most want to be. No reason needed.

items.sourceNote: 「一起做無聊的事」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我很喜歡我們一起做無聊事的時候。

什麼都不說，
或是說一些完全不重要的話，
然後時間就這樣過去了。

這種無聊，我願意一直有。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在某個平靜的週末下午傳給另一半，讓對方知道你珍惜的不只是特別的時刻
variations: 跟你一起發呆也是我喜歡的事情之一。

en.content:
I really like the times we do nothing together.

Silent, or saying things that don't matter,
and somehow an hour disappears.

I'd take that kind of boring any day.
en.editorNote: Send on a slow weekend afternoon — let your partner know you treasure the quiet moments just as much
variations: Doing nothing with you is one of my favorite things.

items.sourceNote: 「愛上對方的小缺點」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
你那些小毛病，
我都知道。

喝湯很大聲，
找東西永遠找不到，
說好五分鐘結果要等半小時。

我都知道，但我還是很喜歡你。
大概就是這樣了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 帶點幽默但很真心，適合交往有一段時間後傳給對方，讓他知道你的喜歡是看清楚之後的選擇
variations: 我了解你的所有缺點，然後還是喜歡你，這就是我的答案。

en.content:
I know all your little quirks.

The way you slurp soup,
how you can never find anything,
how 'five minutes' turns into thirty.

I know all of it. And I still really like you.
That's pretty much the whole story.
en.editorNote: Warm and a little playful — best sent after you've been together a while, to show your affection is a clear-eyed choice
variations: I know exactly what I'm getting into with you, and I'm still in. That's my answer.

items.sourceNote: 「你笑的時候」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
你笑起來的時候，
我每次都會忘了自己在說什麼。

不是誇張，是真的。
就是那樣而已。
zh-tw.editorNote: 簡短但很真，適合在對方哈哈大笑後傳過去，不矯情但很有感
variations: 你剛剛那個笑，我需要一點時間恢復。

en.content:
When you laugh,
I always lose track of whatever I was saying.

Not an exaggeration. It just happens.
That's it. That's the whole message.
en.editorNote: Short and sincere — send right after they laugh at something, no setup needed
variations: That smile just now. Give me a second.

items.sourceNote: 「允許彼此不完美」主題參考，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
謝謝你讓我可以很爛。

狀態差的時候不用假裝沒事，
說錯話的時候不用一直道歉，
不想說話的時候可以就這樣待著。

你讓我覺得我不用一直表現好，
這件事對我來說很重要。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給讓你可以展示真實狀態、不需要偽裝的那個人，這是比浪漫更深的珍惜
variations: 跟你在一起，我不用每天都是最好的版本。謝謝你接住那些不好的部分。

en.content:
Thank you for letting me be a mess.

Not having to pretend when things are rough.
Not needing to over-apologize when I say something wrong.
Being able to go quiet without explaining why.

You make me feel like I don't have to be on all the time.
That means more than I can say.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who accepts you on your worst days — this kind of gratitude runs deeper than romance
variations: With you, I don't have to show up as my best self every day. Thank you for holding the rest of me too.

items.sourceNote: 「你就是我的家」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
以前我以為「家」是個地方。

後來才發現，
家是一種感覺——
就是那種跟你說話、旁邊坐著你、
什麼都不用解釋也沒關係的感覺。

你就是那個感覺。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給讓你有歸屬感的人，不一定是伴侶，也可以是讓你覺得被接納的對象
variations: 不管在哪，只要你在，那個地方就變成我想待的地方。

en.content:
I used to think home was a place.

Turns out it's more of a feeling —
the kind where you're talking to someone
and nothing needs explaining
and everything just settles.

That feeling has your name on it.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who makes you feel like you belong — works for a partner or anyone who truly gets you
variations: Wherever you are, that's where I want to be. Not because of the place. Because of you.

items.sourceNote: 「被看見」情感主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
你知道我喝咖啡只喝半杯。
知道我講電話很煩、很快掛掉。
知道我說「隨便」其實有意見。

你記得這些有的沒的小事，
讓我覺得我在你眼裡是個真實的人，
不是一個輪廓。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種記得你細節的人，這比說「我愛你」還讓人感動
variations: 你好像比我更了解我自己。我說這個是在誇你，不是抱怨。

en.content:
You know I never finish a full cup of anything.
You know when I say "I don't care" I usually do.
You know which topics make me go quiet.

You notice all these small, specific things about me
that most people never bother to clock.

That's not nothing. That's everything.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who pays attention to the details — being truly seen by someone is one of the best feelings
variations: You know me in the small ways. Somehow that hits harder than the big declarations.

items.sourceNote: 「平凡日子裡的喜歡」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我喜歡你的方式很無聊。

喜歡你傳訊息打錯字還不修正。
喜歡你吃東西的時候很認真的樣子。
喜歡你講到有興趣的事時語速變快。

都是很小的事，
但這些小事加起來，
就是為什麼我喜歡你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給交往一段時間的伴侶，用具體的小細節取代空洞的「我愛你」，更有溫度
variations: 你那些小習慣，我都記得。然後我都喜歡。

en.content:
The way I like you is pretty ordinary.

I like how you don't fix your typos.
I like how focused you get when you're eating something good.
I like how your words speed up when you hit a topic you care about.

They're all small things.
But add them up and
that's exactly why I like you.
en.editorNote: Great to send after you've been together a while — specific details land harder than vague declarations
variations: I've catalogued all your little habits. The verdict: I like every single one.

items.sourceNote: 「好好睡、我在」晚安安心訊息主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
好好睡。

不用想太多，
明天的事明天再說，
今天那些沒解決的事不急。

你就先休息，
我等你明天醒來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 睡前傳給對方，特別適合對方最近壓力大或在煩惱事情的時候，安靜但很有力量
variations: 今天辛苦了。把那些還沒想清楚的先放著，先睡，明天我們再一起面對。

en.content:
Get some sleep.

Don't overthink tonight.
The things that aren't figured out yet can wait.
You don't have to solve anything before you close your eyes.

Just rest.
I'll be here when you wake up.
en.editorNote: Send before bed when your person is stressed or stuck in their head — calm and grounding, not dramatic
variations: You worked hard today. Leave the unfinished thoughts for tomorrow. Sleep first. I've got you.

items.sourceNote: 「一起老去的期待」長遠承諾主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我沒辦法保證我們每天都過得很好，
也沒辦法保證我每次都說對話。

但有一件事我很確定：
以後那些普通的、無聊的、什麼都沒發生的日子，
我都想跟你一起過。

就這樣，這就是我想要的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給長期伴侶，不誇大也不輕巧，是那種說完讓人心裡很安穩的話
variations: 不需要每天都精彩，只要你在旁邊，連發呆都算是一種幸福。

en.content:
I can't promise every day will be good,
or that I'll always say the right thing.

But I'm sure about one thing:
all those regular, uneventful, nothing-special days ahead —
I want to spend them with you.

That's it. That's what I want.
en.editorNote: For long-term partners — not a grand gesture, just a quiet, steady kind of love that feels solid
variations: The ordinary days don't need to be exciting. As long as you're there, even the slow ones feel like enough.

items.sourceNote: 「日常細節裡的愛」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我喜歡的不是什麼驚天動地的浪漫，
是早上你還沒睡醒的聲音、
是你吃飯時偶爾抬頭看我一眼、
是兩個人坐在沙發上各做各的事，也不會覺得無聊。

這些小事加起來，才是我想要的生活。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給穩定交往的對象，是那種不喧嘩但很實在的告白
variations: 我要的不是浪漫電影，是跟你一起過完平凡的禮拜三。

en.content:
What I love isn't anything dramatic.
It's your voice when you've just woken up,
the way you glance up at me mid-meal,
the two of us on the couch doing our own thing — and somehow not getting bored.

All those tiny things add up. That's the life I want.
en.editorNote: For a steady relationship — quiet, grounded, the kind of confession that doesn't need volume
variations: I don't want a movie romance. I want to spend an ordinary Wednesday with you.

items.sourceNote: 「在你身邊變成更好的自己」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
認識你之後我才發現，
原來被人好好喜歡是一件這麼安心的事。

不用裝堅強、不用怕說錯話，
就算累到只剩一句「我今天不太行」，你也會接住。

你沒有改變我，你只是讓我敢做自己。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在感情比較深、想表達感謝的時候用，不肉麻但很有重量
variations: 你沒有把我變成另一個人，你只是讓我終於敢當原本的自己。

en.content:
Since meeting you, I've realized something:
being loved well is one of the most calming things in the world.

I don't have to perform.
I don't have to pick the right words.
Even on days when all I can say is "I'm not okay today," you catch it.

You didn't change me. You just made it safe to be myself.
en.editorNote: For deeper moments when you want to thank your partner — heartfelt without being over the top
variations: You didn't turn me into someone new. You just made it safe to finally be myself.

items.sourceNote: 「想你的小細節」思念主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
今天經過一間咖啡店，聞到拿鐵的味道就想到你。
中午同事點了你最愛的那家便當，我又想到你。
下班看到天空很漂亮，第一個念頭還是「拍給你看」。

我也不知道為什麼，今天好像哪裡都有你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在分隔兩地或一天沒見面時傳，輕巧但很甜
variations: 今天好像走到哪裡都會分心一下，因為哪裡都有你的影子。

en.content:
Walked past a café today and the smell of lattes made me think of you.
A coworker ordered from your favorite spot at lunch — thought of you again.
The sky on my way home was beautiful, and my first instinct was to send you a picture.

I don't know what it is. You were kind of everywhere today.
en.editorNote: For when you haven't seen each other in a day or two — light, sweet, low-effort vibe
variations: You've been showing up in random little places all day. Just thought you should know.

items.sourceNote: 「平淡裡的浪漫」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不是那種會送大禮物、講大道理的人。

但你哪天難過、哪天不舒服、哪天突然不想講話，
我都會在。

不會逼你解釋、不會急著給建議，
就是讓你知道：這裡很安全，你可以慢慢來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合對方在低潮或情緒比較滿的時候傳，不催促也不戲劇化
variations: 你不用立刻好起來，我可以陪你慢慢的。

en.content:
I'm not the big-gesture, big-speech kind of person.

But on the days you're sad, or off, or just don't feel like talking —
I'll be here.

No pressure to explain.
No rushing to fix it.
Just me reminding you: this is a safe spot. You can take your time.
en.editorNote: For when your person is going through something — calm, no pressure, no fixing
variations: You don't have to be okay right now. I'm not going anywhere.

items.sourceNote: 「想跟你一起的小日常」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我最近常常在想一些小事：

禮拜六早上一起去買菜、
冬天兩個人擠一條毛毯看電影、
夏天晚上散步去買冰、
下雨天什麼都不做就是賴在床上。

這些畫面裡都有你，所以我想我是真的很喜歡你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合交往一陣子之後，想表達「我有在認真想我們的未來」的訊息
variations: 我幻想的未來都有你在裡面，我才發現我已經把你算進來了。

en.content:
Lately I keep thinking about small things:

Saturday mornings at the grocery store together,
sharing one blanket on the couch in winter,
walking out for ice cream on a summer night,
lazy rainy days when we don't do anything at all.

You're in every one of those pictures. I think that means I'm really, really into you.
en.editorNote: For a few months in — when you want to softly say "I'm picturing a future with you"
variations: Every version of the future I daydream about has you in it. Figured you should know.

items.sourceNote: 「在你身邊就是家」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
外面再亂、再煩、再難講，
只要回到你身邊，我就覺得世界突然安靜了。

你不是我用來逃避生活的地方，
你是讓我有力氣再面對生活的那個地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合工作很累或最近壓力很大的時候，傳給最想回去的那個人
variations: 我不是逃回你身邊，是因為有你我才走得下去。

en.content:
No matter how loud or messy the day gets,
the second I'm back with you, everything goes quiet inside me.

You're not where I run away from life.
You're the reason I can keep showing up to it.
en.editorNote: Send when you've had a long, draining day and they're the person you wanted to come back to
variations: You're not my escape. You're the reason I can keep going.

items.sourceNote: 「平凡裡的浪漫」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
別人問我喜歡你哪裡，我都答不太出來。

不是因為沒有，是因為太多了：
你笑的時候、你認真的時候、你睡到流口水的時候、
你講冷笑話自己先笑出來的時候⋯⋯

我大概是一整個你都喜歡，沒辦法挑。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合交往一陣子之後，想表達「我喜歡的就是你全部」的甜訊息
variations: 硬要說的話，我喜歡的部分叫做：你。

en.content:
Whenever someone asks what I like about you, I freeze.

Not because I can't think of anything —
because it's too much:
the way you laugh, the way you focus, the way you drool a little when you sleep,
the way you crack up at your own bad jokes before anyone else does.

Turns out I just like all of you. I can't narrow it down.
en.editorNote: Cute and a little playful — for when they ask what you love about them
variations: If I had to pick one favorite thing about you, it'd just be: you.

items.sourceNote: 「為你變成更好的人」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
認識你之後，我發現我會想多努力一點。

不是因為怕你不愛我了，
是因為你那麼好，我想配得上你身邊那個位子。

你讓我變得不一樣，但其實是變回了我本來想成為的樣子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往中，想真誠表達感謝與決心的時刻
variations: 因為有你，我願意花一輩子變成更好的自己。

en.content:
Since I met you, I notice I want to try harder.

Not out of fear that you'll stop loving me —
but because you're so good, and I want to deserve the seat next to you.

You changed me. But really, you just brought me back to the version of me I always wanted to be.
en.editorNote: For a sincere moment in a steady relationship — gratitude with substance
variations: You make me want to keep becoming someone worthy of staying next to you.

items.sourceNote: 「想念你的小細節」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
今天沒見到你，我發現我想念的不是什麼大事。

是你打字打到一半突然抬頭看我、
是你喝水之前會先吹一下、
是你冷的時候會偷偷把手伸過來牽我。

這些小到不行的事，全部加起來就是：我很想你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合分隔兩地或一陣子沒見面的時候傳，比直接說「想你」更有畫面
variations: 想你不是想一件大事，是想一百個你做的小動作。

en.content:
I didn't see you today, and I realized what I miss isn't anything big.

It's the way you look up mid-typing,
the way you blow on your water before drinking it,
the way you sneak your hand into mine when you're cold.

A hundred tiny things I almost don't notice — and added up, they're just: I miss you.
en.editorNote: Better than "I miss you" — for long-distance days or just a day apart
variations: I don't miss one big thing about you. I miss a hundred small ones.

items.sourceNote: 「我選你不是因為心動」主題參考，全新改寫

zh-tw.content:
心動很容易，世界上心動的對象太多了。

但我選你，不只是因為心動，
是因為你讓我覺得安心、讓我願意誠實、讓我捨不得讓你失望。

喜歡是一秒的事，選擇是每一天的事。我每一天都還在選你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合穩定交往一段時間後，想表達「喜歡之外更深一層」的訊息
variations: 心動我有過很多次，但決定留下來的人，只有你。

en.content:
Butterflies are easy. The world is full of people who can give you butterflies.

But I'm not staying because of butterflies.
I'm staying because you make me feel safe, you make me want to be honest, and I'd hate to let you down.

A crush is a second. A choice is every day. And every day, I still choose you.
en.editorNote: For deeper relationship moments — past the crush stage, into the choosing stage
variations: I've had crushes before. You're the one I keep choosing.
